title: - [ ] Manage stale issues and pull requests:
content:
- [ ] Manage stale issues and pull requests:
- Use GitHub Actions or bots to close stale issues/PRs.

---

### **10. Miscellaneous**
- [ ] Configure organization-wide policies for repositories.
- [ ] Add pinned repositories to the organization profile.
- [ ] Create team-specific wikis for documentation.
- [ ] Set up organization billing and payments.

---

This checklist should serve as a comprehensive guide to setting up your GitHub organization and repositories effectively. Let me know if you’d like detailed steps for any part of the checklist!
  • To build a cohesive and scalable ecosystem where all the components interact seamlessly and without conflicts, you need a holistic approach that ensures robust communication, reliable integrations, and continuous adaptability. Below is an expansive and exhaustive logic check to identify potential blind spots and shatter points, along with strategies for evolving the system.

  • ---

  • ### **1. Ecosystem Map**
  • Create a comprehensive map of the ecosystem:
